home.heroPrimaryCtaAriaLabel: Go to 'Start your trip' with the 'By traveller' tab selected
home.heroSubtitle:
Live the unexpected without improvising. We design your trip
and reveal the destination 48 hours before.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Your next unforgettable memory is just one click away. Don't think twice.
home.howItWorksNote: * The destination is revealed 48 hours before to preserve the surprise. Guide and checklist are sent.

howItWorksSteps.title: PLAN
howItWorksSteps.description: Choose dates, origin city, duration and budget. Add filters and mood if you like.

howItWorksSteps.title: GET THE SURPRISE
howItWorksSteps.description: Confirm your trip. We reveal the destination 48 hours before and send you the guide for that mood.

howItWorksSteps.title: TRAVEL STRESS-FREE
howItWorksSteps.description: Pack your bags. Flights and accommodation ready; human support when you need it.

home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps. Zero stress. More discovery.

benefitsSteps.title: stress-free and flexible
benefitsSteps.description: You say how much you want to spend and when; with options and filters to tailor the surprise to you. We take care of the rest.

benefitsSteps.title: All taken care of
benefitsSteps.description: Flights and accommodation aligned to your budget and travel style.

benefitsSteps.title: authentic discovery
benefitsSteps.description: Experience the thrill of the unexpected with real curation, not random.

experiencias.heroCtaAriaLabel: Go to plans by traveler type section
experiencias.heroSubtitle: Choose the budget/plan per person for travel and accommodation. We'll take care of the rest.
experiencias.travelTypeSubtitle: Choose who you're traveling with for this experience.

inspirationBanner.title: Stories from solo travelers that inspire

hero.title: Start the adventure
hero.description: Who will you write your next story with?
hero.subtitle: STARTING POINT

substeps.title: TRAVEL TYPE
substeps.description: From solo getaways to group, family, pet-friendly trips or honeymoon.

substeps.title: EXPERIENCE
substeps.description: The only thing you define here is the per-person budget for travel and accommodation. That's your ceiling. We take care of the rest.

substeps.title: WHAT'S THE REASON FOR MY TRIP
substeps.description: We travel for many reasons—what's driving you today?

substeps.title: ORIGIN
substeps.description: Choose country and city of departure.

substeps.title: DATES
substeps.description: Choose number of days and start date. Weekend or flexible.

substeps.title: TRANSPORT
substeps.description: Set your preferred order of transport options by dragging.

substeps.title: FILTERS
substeps.description: Preferred times, weather, destinations to avoid, max travel time, transport type.

excuses.title: Solo Adventure
excuses.description: Discover the world at your own pace, with no commitments or schedules.

excuses.title: Cultural Immersion
excuses.description: Dive into traditions, flavors, and local customs.

excuses.title: Wellness Retreat
excuses.description: Reconnect with yourself in a peaceful, tranquil setting.

excuses.title: Romantic Getaway
excuses.description: A short trip—enough to tune out the world and tune into each other.

excuses.title: Adventure as a Couple
excuses.description: Discover places together that challenge and bring you closer.

excuses.title: Family Adventure
excuses.description: Create unforgettable memories for the whole family.

excuses.title: Group Adventure
excuses.description: Share unique experiences with your closest friends.

excuses.title: Luxury Honeymoon
excuses.description: The perfect start to your life together with unique experiences.

excuses.title: Adventure with Pets
excuses.description: Include your furry best friend in the adventure.

summary.importantNote1: Transport is required and does not add cost.
